name: astrovision

metadata.name: astrovision
metadata.summary: The compulsory Python library to work with satellite imagery.

documentation:
# Astrovision

The compulsory Python library to work with satellite imagery.

## Pre-requisites

`GDAL` must be installed (`source install_gdal.sh`).

## Installation

```bash
pip install astrovision
```

## Documentation

Documentation can be found here: https://inseefrlab.github.io/astrovision/.

## Contribution

To contribute, refer to `CONTRIBUTING.md`. Astrovision is a poetry built project, to develop install the package with

```
pip install -e .
```

modules.name: astrovision.data.utils
documentation: Util functions for the data module.

functions.name: astrovision.data.utils.generate_tiles_borders
documentation:
Given the dimensions of an original image and a desired tile side length,
this function returns a list of tuples, where each tuple contains the
border indices of a tile that can be extracted from the original image.
The function raises a ValueError if the size of the tile is larger than
the size of the original image.

Args:
    height (int): Height of the original image.
    width (int): Width of the original image.
    tile_length (int): Dimension of tiles.

Returns:
    List: A list of tuples, where each tuple contains the border indices
        of a tile that can be extracted from the original image.

functions.name: astrovision.data.utils.get_bounds_for_tile
documentation:
Given a transformation of a satellite image, and indices for a
tile's row and column, returns the bounding coordinates (left, bottom,
right, top) of the tile.

Args:
    transform (Affine): An affine transformation
    row_indices (Tuple): A tuple containing the minimum and maximum
        indices for the tile's row.
    col_indices (Tuple): A tuple containing the minimum and maximum
        indices for the tile's column

Returns:
    Tuple: A tuple containing the bounding coordinates
        (left, bottom, right, top) of the tile.

functions.name: astrovision.data.utils.get_transform_for_tile
documentation:
Compute the transform matrix of a tile.

Args:
    transform (Affine): An affine transform matrix.
    row_off (int): Minimum row index of the tile.
    col_off (int): Minimum column index of the tile.

Returns:
    Affine: The transform matrix for the given tile.

modules.name: astrovision.filter.bounds
documentation: Filter out of bounds images.

functions.name: astrovision.filter.bounds.filter_oob
documentation:
Filter out images that are not within the bounds of a box.

Args:
    satellite_images (List[SatelliteImage]): List of satellite images.
    polygon_geometry (Polygon): Polygon.
    crs (str): EPSG of the bounds.

Returns:
    List[SatelliteImage]: List of satellite images within the bounds of the box.

modules.name: astrovision.filter
documentation: Filter module

modules.name: astrovision.filter.corruption
documentation: Filtering functions.

functions.name: astrovision.filter.corruption.is_corrupted
documentation:
Check if image is corrupted.

Args:
    image (SatelliteImage): Satellite image.
    black_value_threshold (int): The intensity threshold to consider
        a pixel as black. Pixels with intensity values less than
        this threshold are considered black. Default is 100.
    black_area_threshold (float): The threshold for the proportion
        of black pixels in the image. If the ratio of black pixels
        exceeds this threshold, the function returns True. Default is 0.5.

Returns:
    bool: True if image is corrupted, False otherwise.

functions.name: astrovision.filter.corruption.filter_corrupted
documentation:
Filter out corrupted images.

Args:
    satellite_images (List[SatelliteImage]): List of satellite images.
Returns:
    List[SatelliteImage]: List of satellite images without corrupted images.

modules.name: astrovision
documentation: Astrovision: a toolkit for working with satellite imagery.

modules.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image
documentation:
Classes representing satellite images labeled according
to a segmentation, a classification or an object detection
task.

classes.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage.__init__
documentation:
Constructor.

Args:
    satellite_image (SatelliteImage): Satellite Image.
    label (np.array): Segmentation mask with class IDs (0 to n-1).
    source (Optional[Literal["RIL", "BDTOPO"]]): Labeling source.
    labeling_date (Optional[datetime]): Date of labeling data.
    logits (Optional[bool]): Whether label array is logits or class IDs

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage.split
documentation:
Split the SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage into labeled
tiles of dimension (`tile_length` x `tile_length`).

Args:
    tile_length (int): Dimension of tiles

Returns:
    List[SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage]: Labeled tiles.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage.plot
documentation:
Plot a subset of bands of the satellite image and its
corresponding labels on the same plot.

Args:
    bands_indices (List): List of indices of bands to plot.
        The indices should be integers between 0 and the
        number of bands - 1.
    alpha (float, optional): The transparency of the label
        image when overlaid on the satellite image. A value of
        0 means fully transparent and a value of 1 means fully
        opaque. The default value is 0.3.
    color_palette (list, optional): Color palette.
    class_labels (Optional[List[str]], optional): List of class labels for the legend.
        If not provided, it assumes a binary classification.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage.plot_label_next_to_image
documentation:
Plot a subset of bands from a satellite image and its
corresponding label on the side.

Args:
    bands_indices (List[int]): List of indices of bands to plot.
        The indices should be integers between 0 and the
        number of bands - 1.
    color_palette (list, optional): Color palette.
    class_labels (Optional[List[str]], optional): List of class labels for the legend.
        If not provided, it assumes a binary classification.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage.to_classification_labeled_image
documentation:
Return a ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage.

Args:
    aggregation_method (str): Method to aggregate pixel labels to a single class.
        Options: 'any' (default), 'majority', 'weighted'.

Returns:
    ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage: Image with a single class label.

Class for satellite images with a semantic segmentation label.
The segmentation label supports n classes.

classes.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage.__init__
documentation:
Constructor.

Args:
    satellite_image (SatelliteImage): Satellite image.
    label (List[Tuple[int]]): Object detection label
        with format (x0, y0, x1, y1).
    source (Optional[Literal["RIL", "BDTOPO"]]): Labeling source.
    labeling_date (Optional[datetime]): Date of labeling data.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage.split
documentation:
Split the DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage into labeled
tiles of dimension (`tile_length` x `tile_length`).

Args:
    tile_length (int): Dimension of tiles

Returns:
    List[DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage]: Labeled tiles.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage.plot
documentation:
Plot a subset of bands from the satellite image with its
corresponding label.

Args:
    bands_indices (List[int]): List of indices of bands to plot.
        The indices should be integers between 0 and the
        number of bands - 1.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage.to_classification_labeled_image
documentation: Return a ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage.

Class for satellite images with an object detection label.
The segmentation label is a List of box coordinates indicating
the coordinates of buildings on the image.
TODO: generalize to n classes ?

classes.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage.__init__
documentation:
Constructor.

Args:
    satellite_image (SatelliteImage): Satellite Image.
    label (int): Classification label.
    source (Optional[Literal["RIL", "BDTOPO"]]): Labeling source.
    labeling_date (Optional[datetime]): Date of labeling data.

methods.name: astrovision.data.labeled_satellite_image.ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage.plot
documentation:
Plot a subset of bands of the satellite image with a green
or red overlay depending on whether it is labeled 1 or 0.

Args:
    bands_indices (List): List of indices of bands to plot.
        The indices should be integers between 0 and the
        number of bands - 1.
    alpha (float, optional): The transparency of the label
        color when overlaid on the satellite image. A value of
        0 means fully transparent and a value of 1 means fully
        opaque. The default value is 0.2.
Class for satellite images with 0-1 classification label.

modules.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image
documentation: Satellite image class.

classes.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.__init__
documentation:
Constructor.

Args:
    array (np.array): Image array. Assumes (C, H, W) format.
    crs (str): Coordinate Reference System.
    bounds (Tuple): Bounds for the satellite image.
    transform (Affine): Transform for the satellite image.
    dep (Optional[Literal[DEPARTMENTS_LIST]]): French département
        of the image. Defaults to None.
    date (Optional[date]): Date of the satellite image. Defaults
        to None.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.split
documentation:
Split the SatelliteImage into square tiles of side `tile_length`.

Args:
    tile_length (int): Side of of tiles.

Returns:
    List[SatelliteImage]: List of tiles.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.to_tensor
documentation:
Return SatelliteImage array as a torch.Tensor.

Args:
    bands_indices (List): List of indices of bands to plot.
        The indices should be integers between 0 and the
        number of bands - 1.

Returns:
    torch.Tensor: Image tensor.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.normalize
documentation:
Normalize array values with min-max normalization after
clipping at quantiles.

Args:
    quantile (float): Normalize an array.

Returns:
    SatelliteImage: Normalized image.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.copy
documentation:
Deep copy a satellite image.

Returns:
    SatelliteImage: Copied image.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.plot
documentation:
Plot a subset of bands from a 3D array as an image.

Args:
    bands_indices (List[int]): List of indices of bands to plot.
        The indices should be integers between 0 and the
        number of bands - 1.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.from_raster
documentation:
Factory method to create a Satellite image from a raster file.

Args:
    file_path (str): File path.
    dep (Optional[Literal[DEPARTMENTS_LIST]]): Département.
    date (Optional[date]): Date. Defaults to None.
    n_bands (int): Number of bands.
    channels_first (bool): True if channels should be moved
        to first axis.
    cast_to_float (bool): True to cast array to float.

Returns:
    SatelliteImage: Satellite image.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.to_raster
documentation:
Save a SatelliteImage to a raster file
according to the raster type desired (.tif or .jp2).

Args:
    file_path (str): File path.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.to_raster_jp2
documentation:
Save a SatelliteImage to a .jp2 raster file.

Args:
    file_path (str): File path.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.to_raster_tif
documentation:
Save a SatelliteImage to a .tif raster file.

Args:
    file_path (str): File path.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.intersects_box
documentation:
Return True if image intersects a bounding box specified by
`box_bounds` and a `crs`.

Args:
    box_bounds (Tuple): Box bounds.
    crs (str): Projection system.

Returns:
    bool: Boolean.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.intersects_polygon
documentation:
Return True if image intersects a polygon.

Args:
    polygon_geometry (Polygon): Polygon geometry.
    crs (str): Projection system.

Returns:
    bool: Boolean.

methods.name: astrovision.data.satellite_image.SatelliteImage.contains
documentation:
Return True if image contains a point specified by `coordinates`

Args:
    coordinates (Tuple): Coordinates.
    crs (str): Projection system.

Returns:
    bool: Boolean.
Wrapper class for a satellite image.

modules.name: astrovision.sample
documentation: Sample module.

modules.name: astrovision.sample.sample
documentation: Functions to sample from a list of satellite images.

functions.name: astrovision.sample.sample.compute_distance_to_point
documentation:
Return distance between the centroid of a satellite image
and a point with coordinates `coordinates`.

Args:
    satellite_image (SatelliteImage): Satellite image.
    coordinates (List[float]): Coordinates of the point.
    crs (str): EPSG of coordinates. Defaults to "EPSG:4326".

Returns:
    float: Distance in kilometers.

functions.name: astrovision.sample.sample.is_within_distance
documentation:
Return True if the centroid of a satellite image is within distance
`distance` of a point with coordinates `coordinates`.

Args:
    satellite_image (SatelliteImage): Satellite image.
    distance (float): Distance in kilometers.
    coordinates (List[float]): Coordinates of the point.
    crs (str): EPSG. Defaults to "EPSG:4326".

Returns:
    bool: True if image is within distance.

functions.name: astrovision.sample.sample.sample_around_coordinates
documentation:
Sample satellite images which are within a distance
`distance` from a point with coordinates `coordinates`.

Args:
    satellite_image (SatelliteImage): Satellite image.
    distance (float): Distance in kilometers.
    coordinates (List[float]): Coordinates of the point.
    crs (str): EPSG. Defaults to "EPSG:4326".

Returns:
    Tuple[List[SatelliteImage]]: Tuple containing two lists,
        the first containing the images which are within the
        given distance of the specified point and the second
        containing the others.

functions.name: astrovision.sample.sample.project
documentation:
Reproject coordinates.

Args:
    coordinates (List[float]): Coordinates.
    input_crs (str): EPSG.
    output_crs (str): EPSG.

Returns:
    List[float]: Reprojected coordinates.

modules.name: astrovision.plot
documentation: Plot module.

modules.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils
documentation: Utility functions for plotting.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.make_mosaic
documentation:
Creates a mosaic image from a list of satellite images.

Args:
    images (List[Union[SatelliteImage, SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage]]):
        A list of satellite images to be used for creating the mosaic.
    bands_indices (List[int]):
        A list of band indices to be used for creating the mosaic.

Returns:
    The mosaic image created from the input images.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the image type is not supported.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.make_mosaic_si
documentation:
Create a mosaic from satellite images.

Args:
    satellite_images (List[SatelliteImage]): Images.
    bands_indices (List[int]): Indices of bands to include in the mosaic.

Returns:
    SatelliteImage: Mosaic of satellite images.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.make_mosaic_lsi
documentation:
Create a mosaic from labeled satellite images.

Args:
    labelled_satellite_images (List[SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage]): Labeled images.
    bands_indices (List[int]): Indices of bands to include in the mosaic.

Returns:
    SegmentationLabeledSatelliteImage: Mosaic of satellite images and labels.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.plot_images
documentation:
Plot satellite images.

Args:
    satellite_images (List[SatelliteImage]): Images.
    bands_indices (List[int]): Indices of bands to plot.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.plot_images_with_segmentation_label
documentation:
Plot satellite images with segmentation labels.

Args:
    labeled_satellite_images (List[ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage]):
        Images with segmentation label.
    bands_indices (List[int]): Indices of bands to plot.
    overlay (bool): Whether to overlay segmentation label on top
        of satellite image.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.plot_images_with_classification_label
documentation:
Plot satellite images with classification labels.

Args:
    labeled_satellite_images (List[ClassificationLabeledSatelliteImage]):
        Images with classification labels.
    bands_indices (List[int]): Indices of bands to plot.
    overlay (bool): Whether to overlay segmentation label on top
        of satellite image.

functions.name: astrovision.plot.plot_utils.plot_images_with_detection_label
documentation:
Plot satellite images with detection labels.

Args:
    labeled_satellite_images (List[DetectionLabeledSatelliteImage]): Images with
        detection labels.
    bands_indices (List[int]): Indices of bands to plot.
    overlay (bool, optional): Whether to overlay segmentation label on top.
        Defaults to True.
